ddls:
CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "player_name" TEXT /* Full name of the player */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the player */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the player belongs to */,
  "league" TEXT /* League the player plays in */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position of the player (e.g., PG, SG) */,
  "height" REAL /* Height of the player in inches */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the player in pounds */,
  "draft_year" INTEGER /* Year the player was drafted */,
  "draft_round" INTEGER /* Round the player was drafted in */,
  "draft_pick" INTEGER /* Pick number the player was drafted with */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_players_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "seasons" (
  "season_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each season */,
  "season_name" TEXT /* Name of the season (e.g., 2000-01) */,
  "start_year" INTEGER /* Start year of the season */,
  "end_year" INTEGER /* End year of the season */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("season_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "shooting_distances" (
  "shooting_distance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each shooting distance record */,
  "player_season_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player-season record */,
  "zero_to_three" REAL /* Two-point shooting percentage from 0-3 feet */,
  "three_to_ten" REAL /* Two-point shooting percentage from 3-10 feet */,
  "ten_to_sixteen" REAL /* Two-point shooting percentage from 10-16 feet */,
  "sixteen_to_three" REAL /* Two-point shooting percentage from 16 feet to 3-point line */,
  "three_point" REAL /* Three-point shooting percentage */,
  "three_to_six" REAL /* Three-point shooting percentage from 3-6 feet */,
  "six_to_ten" REAL /* Three-point shooting percentage from 6-10 feet */,
  "ten_to_fourteen" REAL /* Three-point shooting percentage from 10-14 feet */,
  "fourteen_to_sixteen" REAL /* Three-point shooting percentage from 14-16 feet */,
  "sixteen_to_eighteen" REAL /* Three-point shooting percentage from 16-18 feet */,
  "eighteen_to_twenty" REAL /* Three-point shooting percentage from 18-20 feet */,
  "twenty_plus" REAL /* Three-point shooting percentage from 20+ feet */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("shooting_distance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_shooting_distances_player_season_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_season_id") REFERENCES player_seasons ("player_season_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "advanced_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each advanced metric record */,
  "player_season_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player-season record */,
  "percentage_assisted" REAL /* Percentage of shots assisted */,
  "percentage_field_goal_attempts" REAL /* Percentage of field goal attempts from different distances */,
  "percentage_three_point_attempts" REAL /* Percentage of three-point attempts */,
  "three_point_percentage" REAL /* Three-point field goal percentage */,
  "true_shooting_percentage" REAL /* True shooting percentage */,
  "effective_field_goal_percentage" REAL /* Effective field goal percentage */,
  "free_throw_rate" REAL /* Free throw rate */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_advanced_metrics_player_season_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_season_id") REFERENCES player_seasons ("player_season_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_abbr" TEXT /* Abbreviation of the team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Full name of the team */,
  "league" TEXT /* League the team belongs to */,
  "division" TEXT /* Division the team belongs to */,
  "conference" TEXT /* Conference the team belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., coach, analyst, admin) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_teams" (
  "user_team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user-team record */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_team_id")
)
column_names: ID of the team the player belongs to
Position of the player (e.g., PG, SG)
Height of the player in inches
Weight of the player in pounds
Round the player was drafted in
Pick number the player was drafted with
Unique identifier for each shooting distance record
Two-point shooting percentage from 16 feet to 3-point line
Unique identifier for each advanced metric record
Percentage of field goal attempts from different distances
Role of the user (e.g., coach, analyst, admin)
Unique identifier for each user-team record
